sentiment.reasoning: Participation in an industry forum is a standard corporate event with negligible direct financial impact.

headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace sees 25% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 25% drop in new orders is a strong negative signal regarding demand that will likely impact financial results for the remainder of the quarter.

headlines.headline: Arnos Marketplace Chief Strategy Officer steps down unexpectedly citing personal reasons

sentiment.reasoning: The unexpected departure of a Chief Strategy Officer creates leadership instability and uncertainty regarding future strategic direction.

headlines.headline: Yorvov Pharmaceuticals launches next-generation wireless connectivity platform

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
